ground_truth.title: TE Certified Electricians Pricing Guide near Atlanta, GA
ground_truth.main_content:
This guide provides pricing for electrical services in and around the Atlanta area. Note: This is a helpful list only. Your project may differ significantly in price. For an exact quote schedule an appointment today.

Troubleshooting Electrical Problems in the House: No Power Issues or Troubleshooting - $149+ (Flat Rate Guarantee) - Includes service call, solution guaranteed troubleshooting, and free minor adjustments. Parts and repairs not included.

Replacing Ceiling Fans or Lights in Tall Ceilings - Installation prices listed Above plus $80 - $250+ for ladders/scaffolding and safety precautions (We Consider a Ceiling over 12' Tall).

Complicated Ceiling Fans and Lights with New Box and Wire to Power Source - $350+.

How We're Qualified: There are a lot of electric companies in Atlanta wanting your attention, especially when you have the least amount of time imaginable! So our promise is simple: If you see an electrician in our uniform, he'll be both state-licensed and TE Certified. TE Certified techs are specialists. They are also W-2 employees of our company which means they answer to us for every minute they're in the field, at your home, and working on your equipment. Our technicians complete many hours of extensive in-house training, and pass written exams, code testing, and hands-on skill assessments. Mandatory weekly training sessions keep them up-to-date on the latest in electrician trends and electrical guidelines.

Since electrical is our business, our service vans carry the latest in technology and diagnostic devices, the best time-tested tools and equipment of our trade, and the electrical repair parts we use all of the time. We restock daily to make sure the one showing up in front of your house is fully-equipped to meet your project head-on.

If you see an electrician in our uniform, he'll be both state-licensed and TE Certified.
Our service vans carry the latest in technology and diagnostic devices.
